headline: Principal Financial Group Integration With Employee Navigator And Valuation Context
summary: Principal Financial Group (NasdaqGS:PFG) has announced an integration with Employee Navigator. The move is intended to streamline benefits enrollment and evidence of insurability for employers and employees. The integration focuses on automating administrative steps to improve efficiency in Principal's group benefits business. For investors watching NasdaqGS:PFG, this news sits alongside a share price of $100.5 and a record of returns that some will consider when judging execution on...
